channel.title: Jazz Night In America: The Radio Program (Full Archive)
channel.description: Scraped archive of NPR's Jazz Night In America radio episodes, with direct MP3 enclosures, formatted for Zune.

image.title: Jazz Night In America: The Radio Program (Full Archive)

item.title: Keyon Harrold celebrates 100 years of Miles Davis at Carnegie Hall
item.description: To mark the occasion of Miles Davis' centennial, trumpeter Keyon Harrold put on a concert at Carnegie Hall and shared a candid conversation about the legend with Christian McBride. Working Headline:Keyon Harrold celebrates 100 years of Miles Davis at Carnegie Hall Listen· 56:0856-Minute ListenPlaylist Toggle more options Download Embed Embed

item.title: Keyon Harrold celebrates 100 years of Miles Davis at Carnegie Hall
item.description: To mark the occasion of Miles Davis' centennial, trumpeter Keyon Harrold put on a concert at Carnegie Hall and shared a candid conversation about the legend with Christian McBride. item.title: The Montreal International Jazz Festival, through the years
item.description: From Miles Davis to Diana Krall, we revisit iconic performances and unforgettable moments from 46 years of the Montreal International Jazz Festival. in progress: The Montreal International Jazz Festival, through the years Listen· 56:2156-Minute ListenPlaylist Toggle more options Download Embed Embed

item.title: On a tiny Croatian island, a jazz festival is giving musicians room to breathe
item.description: What happens when musicians aren't rushing from gig to gig? At the Ponta Lopud Jazz Festival in Croatia, they stay, connect and play. On a tiny Croatian island, a jazz festival is giving musicians room to breathe Listen· 56:2556-Minute ListenPlaylist Toggle more options Download Embed Embed

item.title: On a tiny Croatian island, a jazz festival is giving musicians room to breathe
item.description: What happens when musicians aren't rushing from gig to gig? At the Ponta Lopud Jazz Festival in Croatia, they stay, connect and play. item.title: On a tiny Croatian island, a jazz festival is giving musicians room to breathe
item.description: What happens when musicians aren't rushing from gig to gig? At the Ponta Lopud Jazz Festival in Croatia, they stay, connect and play. On a tiny Croatian island, a jazz festival is giving musicians room to breathe Listen· 56:2556-Minute ListenPlaylist Toggle more options Download Embed Embed
